title: Spear of Longinus FUN FACT
wikitext:
[]: Spear of Longinus FUN FACT!!!             Quote Post by Skullraper » Wed Jan 02, 2008 9:53 pm Just for FUN I’ve calculated the velocity of the Spear of Longinus in EoE. The average distance between Earth and the Moon is about 384,000 km (238,464 miles). The Spear covers this distance in approximately 11 seconds. To do this the Spear had to travel at the following speeds. KILOMETERS per hour : 125,672,717 per second : 34,909 MILES per hour : 78,089,412 per second : 21,691.5 This is about 12% the speed of light. At this speed the Spear could travel from the Sun to Neptune (4,487,940,000 km) in only 36 hours! If you see an error feel free to correct me. c = 1,079,252,848.8 kilometers per hour.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Jan 02, 2008 10:18 pm Sun to Neptune in only 36 hours? That doesn't sound right, as I thought it took three days for light to reach Earth from the Sun. Or was it three minutes?

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 02, 2008 10:30 pm i thought it took light 8 min to get from the Sun to the Earth

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Jan 02, 2008 10:56 pm Whoa. I never knew an Evangelion could actually throw something at 12% of the speed of light! Sweet. Someone should've hitched a free ride to the moon!

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Wed Jan 02, 2008 10:57 pm NAveryW wrote: Sun to Neptune in only 36 hours? That doesn't sound right, as I thought it took three days for light to reach Earth from the Sun. Or was it three minutes?

[]:             Quote Post by jaychouf4n » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:10 pm Well, there's also gravity, air resistance and a multitude of other forces to take into account. Wouldn't it travel a lot faster in space, since it is a vacuum.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:14 pm jaychouf4n wrote: Well, there's also gravity, air resistance and a multitude of other forces to take into account. Wouldn't it travel a lot faster in space, since it is a vacuum.

[]:             Quote Post by jaychouf4n » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:26 pm nevertheless cool result =] the pain if you got hit by something travellling at that speed

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:29 pm imagine if it hit a moon or a small planet at the speed.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:33 pm jaychouf4n wrote: the pain if you got hit by something travellling at that speed

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:39 pm you'd probably be killed before it hit you

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:45 pm Even more remarkable is the fact that the Spear can decelerate from this velocity in less than a second! If we knew the mass and density of the Spear we could calculate inertia and all sorts of other FUN stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jan 02, 2008 11:59 pm ya huh. i say it weighs 2 POUNDS!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:06 am Sachiel_13 wrote: ya huh. i say it weighs 2 POUNDS!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:12 am fine .0056 kilograms

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:43 am Sweet. It would be cool to travel in space at that speed. And you hit a star. Hee hee. Or a black hole. Nah. Probably at least 100 tonnes because it WOULD actually seem heavy from close up. My guess is that Eva 01's AT Field stopped it in less than a second. Pretty much nothing in a logical sense could stop it that fast.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:46 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: my guess is that Eva 01's AT Field stopped it in less than a second. Pretty much nothing in a logical sense could stop it that fast.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:52 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: My guess is that Eva 01's AT Field stopped it in less than a second.

[]:             Quote Post by Skullraper » Thu Jan 03, 2008 12:58 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: My guess is that Eva 01's AT Field stopped it in less than a second. Pretty much nothing in a logical sense could stop it that fast.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 03, 2008 1:19 am Skullraper wrote: It’s intent was to subdue Eva-01.
